message:
feat(v3): Complete hooks system, CLI, MCP tools - fix all critical gaps

## Hooks System (NEW - was completely missing)
- Created /v3/@claude-flow/shared/src/hooks/ (3,381 lines)
- 26 hook events (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, PreEdit, etc.)
- HookRegistry, HookExecutor with event bus integration
- 29 tests all passing

## Hooks CLI Command (NEW - 11 subcommands)
- Created /v3/@claude-flow/cli/src/commands/hooks.ts (1,370 lines)
- pre-edit, post-edit, pre-command, post-command
- route, explain, pretrain, build-agents, metrics, transfer, list

## Hooks MCP Tools (NEW - 9 tools)
- Created /v3/mcp/tools/hooks-tools.ts (1,323 lines)
- hooks/pre-edit, hooks/post-edit, hooks/route, hooks/explain
- hooks/pretrain, hooks/metrics, hooks/list

## Real MCP Handlers (replaced ALL stubs)
- agent-tools.ts: Connected to UnifiedSwarmCoordinator
- swarm-tools.ts: Real coordinator integration
- memory-tools.ts: AgentDB/UnifiedMemoryService integration
- config-tools.ts: Real filesystem operations

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
